perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a white long-sleeved dress sits in a white chair, drinking from a glass and cradling a large pink quilted cushion like a baby. (2) Cut to a extreme close-up of the woman's face looking distressed, with skin imperfections highlighted. (3) She addresses the camera directly with exaggerated expressions of frustration. (4) Close-up shot of a Kiehl's 'Triple Acid Peel' serum bottle. (5) Split-screen comparison showing 'Before' (rough skin) and 'After' (smooth skin). (6) The woman uses a dropper to apply the serum and massages her face. (7) Graphical overlay explaining the product's penetration into shallow, middle, and deep skin layers. (8) Transition to the woman holding a Kiehl's Calendula Toner bottle. (9) She takes the toner out of a white refrigerator and applies it with cotton pads on her cheeks. (10) The final scene shows her sitting at a table surrounded by many small product boxes and bottles, gesturing enthusiastically.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. (2) A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, energetic, and slightly comedic tone, mimicking frustration then relief. (3) A professional male narrator's voice joins, explaining the scientific benefits of the products and the current promotional deals. (4) Occasional 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects occur when key text or graphics appear on screen. (5) The music remains consistent in its high energy until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '我以為帶小孩的我' (Me taking care of a kid, as I imagined). (2) Decorative Text: '毛孔粗大' (Large pores), '油光' (Oily shine), '粉刺問題' (Acne issues) with a stressed tone. (3) Hook Text: 'Kiehl's 三酸溜溜瓶' (Kiehl's Triple Acid Peel). (4) Hook Text: '3天有感嫩滑' (Noticeable smoothness in 3 days) with an excited tone. (5) Functional Text: '天天在家擦的水飛梭' (HydraFacial you apply at home every day). (6) Promotional Text: '買一送一' (Buy one get one free), '612 MOMO 超品日' indicating a shopping festival.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Expectation vs Reality) -> Problem -> Product Introduction -> Clinical Explanation -> Secondary Product Intro -> Promotion/CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appears in every scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a minimalist white long-sleeved button-down dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, bright white minimalist room with a designer white chair; later a wooden table setting filled with cosmetic product packaging.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: High-key studio lighting, very bright and flattering.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Evidence -> Demo -> Promotion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a high-energy commercial designed to sell Kiehl's skincare products by targeting mothers (or busy individuals) who experience skin fatigue and imperfections. It uses a relatable 'Expectation vs. Reality' trope to build rapport, demonstrates product efficacy through 'Before/After' visuals and technical graphics, and drives immediate action with limited-time 'Buy One Get One' offers on the MOMO shopping platform.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly addresses the camera to recommend the brand, demonstrates its application, and lists promotional prices on a specific platform.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Dual-vocal narration style (female host + male announcer), high-density motion text overlays, and humor-driven hooks.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of an off-screen male voice acting as a 'professional announcer' provides a contrast to the female creator's emotional 'user testimonial' tone, a common technique in Taiwanese infomercial-style social media content to balance relatability with authority.
